prompt: Derive test cases for the FuelRateLimiter unit. The detailed design is in evals/files/fuel-rate-limiter-design.yaml. Use Python with pytest.
assertions: Output includes a coverage matrix mapping design elements to test cases
Every behavior rule (startup clamping, cruise rate-of-change, emergency shutdown, was_clamped flag) has at least one test
Every error_handling entry (negative rate, negative elapsed_time, unrecognized mode) has a dedicated test
Boundary values tested for requested_rate (0.0, negative, at STARTUP_MIN, at STARTUP_MAX, at CRUISE_MAX)
No test uses 'assert does not raise' or 'assert no exception' as its only assertion
Test names describe the scenario being tested, not just the method name
Stateful behavior tested: rate-of-change limiting requires multiple sequential calls
Configuration variants tested: at least one test with non-default config values
